mapper.select:
SELECT
m.major_name AS groupName, ps.major_id AS groupId
ps.grade AS groupName, ps.grade AS groupId
,
SUM(CASE WHEN cr.repeat_rate <= 30.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS qualified_count,
SUM(CASE WHEN cr.repeat_rate > 30.00 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS unqualified_count,
ROUND(AVG(cr.repeat_rate), 4) AS avg_repeat_rate FROM check_result cr
LEFT JOIN paper_submit ps ON cr.submit_id = ps.id LEFT JOIN major m ON ps.major_id = m.id
LEFT JOIN check_rule rule ON cr.rule_id = rule.id WHERE
DATE(cr.check_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
AND ps.major_id = #{majorId}
AND ps.grade = #{grade}
AND cr.status = 1 AND cr.is_deleted = 0 AND ps.is_deleted = 0 GROUP BY
ps.major_id, m.major_name ps.grade
ORDER BY groupName ASC
SELECT * FROM check_result WHERE repeat_rate >= #{threshold} AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY repeat_rate DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_checks, ROUND(AVG(repeat_rate), 2) AS avg_repeat_rate, MAX(repeat_rate) AS max_repeat_rate, MIN(repeat_rate) AS min_repeat_rate FROM check_result WHERE DATE(check_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} AND status = 1 AND is_deleted = 0
